creator: iga@metabyte.com
text:
I've been plagued by this panic for quite a while now on my internet gateway/proxy/firewall machine. It's started on version 2.2.5. Recent upgrade to -STABLE didn't help a bit. System crashes only at day time, when my local users are actively browsing the Net.
I found two old unresolved and closed, but suspiciosly similar PRs: kern/216 and kern/7288. Mine system has the same SCSI adapter as theirs: NCR 53c815.

Dmesg and kgdb output follows.

      tf_edx = 6381568, tf_ecx = 8192, tf_eax = 4, tf_trapno = 22, tf_err = 7,

#14 0x36965 in ?? ()
#15 0x1095 in ?? ()
(kgdb)

Fix: 

Not known. Many thanks in advance to anyone who can spend some time investigating this problem.
How-To-Repeat: I don't think it's possible to reproduce exactly my setup and network environment. System crashes at random time about once a day. Vmcore files are avaliable upon request.
